title: Iran Talks Initiated Amidst War Disaster Warnings

summary: Haaretz reports 20 rockets fired from Lebanon at Northern Israel; Iranian missile strikes Tel Aviv.

summary: 6abc Philadelphia reports ICE agents will be deployed at Philadelphia International Airport.
